## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss School AI's products, growth strategy, and potential SEO improvements with new agency partner.](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [School AI's key differentiator is "Spaces" - adaptive, student-facing learning environments](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Brand awareness and SEO improvement are top priorities to compete in saturated edtech market](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Product overhaul (v2.0) launching in June; opportunity to strategically expose some tools for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Founder (Caleb) and educator (Nick) available for thought leadership content creation](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)

## Topics

### School AI Product Overview

  - [Core offerings: teacher tools, assistants, and student-facing "Spaces"](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Spaces: adaptive learning environments with 140+ languages, accessibility features](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Teacher dashboard (Mission Control) for real-time student engagement tracking](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Upcoming: student product, parent dashboard, admin dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Free tier available with usage limits (e.g., 75 daily space sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Saturated market with numerous entrants; schools deciding on AI products within 18 months](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Key competitors: Magic School (teacher productivity focus), Brisk (Chrome extension)](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [School AI aims to be a full-stack platform for schools](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Expanding into higher ed, alternative education, and corrections](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)

### Marketing and SEO Challenges

  - [Marketing team only since October; messaging and positioning need refinement](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [SEO cleanup required: 150,000+ spaces indexed, outdated pages, inconsistent gating](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Competitors have stronger organic presence; catch-up strategy needed](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Opportunity to create ungated versions of popular tools post-2.0 launch](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### Product Roadmap (v2.0)

  - [Launching June 2025](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [ChatGPT-like interface with dual-panel layout (AI chat + document generation)](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [New features: image generator, video creation, simulator](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Some "power-ups" will be premium add-ons](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Leverage founder (Caleb) for impactful thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [Utilize in-house educator (Nick) for writing, including Edutopia contributions](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [New PR person starting soon to support thought leadership efforts](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Repurpose podcast appearances into written content](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nikki to discuss exposing select tools outside login with product team](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Nikki to send list of founder's podcast appearances for content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Dave to develop SEO strategy focusing on keyword expansion and tool-based landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Explore data-driven thought leadership topics for link building and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Coordinate with incoming PR person on thought leadership content creation](https://fathom.video/share/G7oWZzJLN6cw33kDTzxbW4zMcyyTEhox?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
